• Capesize Spot Rates Stabilize as Traders Digest Recent Move - Capesize spot Short-term Indicators
rates have stabilized at around the $20,000 mark after reaching their highest level
Momentum: Negative
for this time of year in many years. Significant congestion in West Africa has
Sentiment: Neutral
tightened the Atlantic market, contributing to the recent bullish sentiment among
Fundamentals: Neutral
traders regarding the near-term rate outlook in that region. Meanwhile, Panamax
spot rates have also experienced a strong rally, now comfortably exceeding

1619
and coal volumes in the last few months.
